articles.title_en: Global reserves cannot replace lost Middle East, Russian supplies — Shoigu
articles.lead_en: The blocking of the Strait of Hormuz has put global food and energy security at risk, the senior Russian security official said

articles.title_en: Several Russian regions impose restrictions on gasoline sales
articles.lead_en: The Irkutsk, Omsk, and Novosibirsk regions have imposed restrictions on gasoline sales.
articles.title_raw: Several Russian regions impose restrictions on gasoline sales
articles.lead_raw: The Irkutsk, Omsk, and Novosibirsk regions have imposed restrictions on gasoline sales.

articles.title_en: For years, Ukrainian strikes stalled within a few kilometers of the front. Meduza mapped thousands of geolocated attacks and found they now reach far behind Russian lines.
articles.lead_en: The war in Ukraine is entering a new phase: while the Russian military’s offensive is bogged down at the front, the Ukrainian Armed Forces have pulled ahead in the drone race. Meduza has already written about how this Ukrainian success led to a fuel collapse in Crimea, how drones broke through Moscow’s layered air defenses, and how strikes on oil refineries have plunged entire regions into a gasoline crisis.
articles.title_raw: For years, Ukrainian strikes stalled within a few kilometers of the front. Meduza mapped thousands of geolocated attacks and found they now reach far behind Russian lines.
articles.lead_raw: The war in Ukraine is entering a new phase: while the Russian military’s offensive is bogged down at the front, the Ukrainian Armed Forces have pulled ahead in the drone race. Meduza has already written about how this Ukrainian success led to a fuel collapse in Crimea, how drones broke through Moscow’s layered air defenses, and how strikes on oil refineries have plunged entire regions into a gasoline crisis.

articles.title_en: AKORT: Russian retail chains maintain logistics stability in the fuel situation
articles.lead_en: Chairman of the Association of Omnichannel Retail Companies Stanislav Bogdanov noted that federal chains are developing their own logistics, routing and distribution infrastructure, which allows them to adapt processes
articles.title_raw: АКОРТ: торговые сети РФ сохраняют устойчивость логистики в ситуации с топливом
articles.lead_raw: Председатель Ассоциации компаний омниканальной розничной торговли Станислав Богданов отметил, что федеральные сети развивают собственную логистику, маршрутизацию и распределительную инфраструктуру, что позволяет им адаптировать процессы

articles.title_en: Russia’s three biggest online marketplaces ban fuel sales
articles.lead_en: Avito, Ozon, and Wildberries banned fuel sales on their platforms at the request of the Federal Antimonopoly Service (FAS), the Russian state news agency RIA Novosti reported, citing a statement from the antimonopoly service.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s three biggest online marketplaces ban fuel sales
articles.lead_raw: Avito, Ozon, and Wildberries banned fuel sales on their platforms at the request of the Federal Antimonopoly Service (FAS), the Russian state news agency RIA Novosti reported, citing a statement from the antimonopoly service.

articles.title_en: The Russian stock market closed with a decline in the main indices
articles.lead_en: In part, the market is reacting to a slowdown in the rate of sequestration of the Central Bank’s key rate, and in part to a decline in oil prices, explained BCS World of Investments expert Andrei Smirnov
articles.title_raw: Российский рынок акций закрылся снижением основных индексов
articles.lead_raw: Отчасти рынок реагирует на замедление темпа секвестра ключевой ставки ЦБ, отчасти - на снижение цен на нефть, пояснил эксперт "БКС мир инвестиций" Андрей Смирнов

articles.title_en: Russian governor urges residents to drive less due to ‘temporary difficulties’ with gasoline
articles.lead_en: Vladimir region Governor Alexander Avdeyev has urged residents to limit personal car travel and buy gasoline “only in the amounts immediately necessary” — a statement he made after an emergency meeting of the regional government on fuel shortages at gas stations.

articles.title_en: Gazprombank Autoleasing announced an increase in sales of Russian cars
articles.lead_en: Over five months, 199 thousand new domestic passenger cars were purchased, which is 31% more than in the same period in 2025

articles.lead_en: The impact destroyed several fuel storage facilities, the Russian Ministry of Defense noted.

articles.title_en: Crimea halts all public gasoline sales, restricts fuel to government agencies
articles.lead_en: All gas stations in Crimea have completely stopped selling fuel, both for general sale and on ration coupons, announced Sergei Aksyonov, the Russian-installed head of the peninsula.

articles.title_en: Ukrainian Strikes on Russian-Annexed Crimea Kill 4, Pause Fuel Sales
articles.lead_en: Ukraine said it targeted military and energy facilities in Crimea in one of the biggest attacks on the peninsula in recent months.
